name: trading-agents
description: Multi-agent stock trading signal analysis framework with two-round debate mechanism. Analyzes through 7 SubAgents in 4 layers (Information Gathering → Opinion Formation → Two-Round Debate → Final Decision), outputs BUY/SELL/HOLD recommendation with rationale in markdown report.
author: laigen

TUSHARE_TOKEN.description: Tushare Pro API Token for A-share market data. Get at: https://tushare.pro/register

BRAVE_API_KEY.description: Brave Search API Key for news and social media search. If not configured, will use built-in web_search tool.

config: Reads TUSHARE_TOKEN and BRAVE_API_KEY from environment variables only
Never modifies user config files automatically
network: Uses web_search for news and sentiment data

credentials: TUSHARE_TOKEN and BRAVE_API_KEY are sensitive credentials
Do NOT paste tokens in chat messages
Do NOT include any API keys or tokens in reports or SubAgent communications
Set via environment variables before running the skill
dataHandling: Financial data is fetched from Tushare Pro API only
Reports are saved locally and not transmitted externally
Reports MUST NOT contain any API keys, tokens, or credential values
subagentRules: SubAgents MUST NOT read any configuration beyond TUSHARE_TOKEN and BRAVE_API_KEY
SubAgents MUST NOT pass API keys or tokens in inter-agent communications
Generated reports MUST NOT contain any sensitive credential information
